fields.name: aboutResultsLabel
fields.label: About {n} Results Label
fields.description: Text label used to display approximate result count. Supports token {n} which is replaced with the actual count.

fields.name: nextLabel
fields.label: 'Next' Label
fields.description: Provide label name for Next Label.

fields.name: previousLabel
fields.label: Previous' Label
fields.description: Provide label name for Previous Label.

fields.name: noResultsLabel
fields.label: 'No Results' Label
fields.description: Provide label name for No Results.

fields.name: sortByLabel
fields.label: 'Sort By' Label
fields.description: Provide label name for Sort By.

fields.name: relevanceLabel
fields.label: 'Relevance' Label
fields.description: Provide label name for Relevance Label.

fields.name: dateLabel
fields.label: 'Date' Label
fields.description: Provide label name for Date Label.

fields.name: numberOfResults
fields.label: Number of items per page
fields.description: Provide number value for Number of Items per page.

fields.name: paginationLimit
fields.label: Pagination limit
fields.description: Provide number value for Pagination limit (number of pages to display in UI).
